documents.title: Contract Law Fundamentals
documents.content: A contract is a legally binding agreement between two or more parties. The essential elements of a valid contract include: offer, acceptance, consideration, capacity, and legality of purpose.

documents.title: Intellectual Property Rights Overview
documents.content: Intellectual property (IP) refers to creations of the mind, such as inventions, literary and artistic works, designs, and symbols. IP rights include patents, copyrights, trademarks, and trade secrets.

documents.title: Data Protection Regulations
documents.content: Data protection laws regulate the collection, storage, and processing of personal data. Key principles include lawfulness, fairness, transparency, purpose limitation, data minimization, and accountability.
